properties.description: Detects anomalous Azure Resource Manager API calls including bulk resource deletions, enumeration of secrets/keys, mass permission changes, or high-rate API calls from a single identity. MITRE ATT&CK: T1526 - Cloud Service Discovery, T1530 - Data from Cloud Storage.
properties.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| where ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
| extend
    CallerUPN     = tostring(Caller),
    OperationName = tostring(OperationNameValue),
    ResourceGroup = tostring(ResourceGroup),
    ResourceType  = tostring(ResourceProviderValue),
    SubscriptionId = tostring(SubscriptionId)
| extend
    IsDeletion    = OperationName has_any ("delete", "Delete", "DELETE"),
    IsSecretOp    = OperationName has_any ("listKeys", "listSecrets", "getSecret", "regenerateKey"),
    IsPermChange  = OperationName has_any ("roleAssignments", "roleDefinitions", "permissions")
| summarize
    TotalCalls        = count(),
    DeleteOps         = countif(IsDeletion == true),
    SecretOps         = countif(IsSecretOp == true),
    PermOps           = countif(IsPermChange == true),
    UniqueResources   = dcount(ResourceGroup),
    UniqueOperations  = dcount(OperationName),
    Operations        = make_set(OperationName, 20),
    FirstSeen         = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen          = max(TimeGenerated)
    by CallerUPN, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| where
    DeleteOps >= 5
    or SecretOps >= 3
    or PermOps >= 5
    or TotalCalls >= 100
    or (UniqueResources >= 10 and TotalCalls >= 30)
| extend
    ThreatType = case(
        DeleteOps >= 5,                       "Bulk Resource Deletion",
        SecretOps >= 3,                       "Secret/Key Enumeration",
        PermOps >= 5,                         "Mass Permission Changes",
        TotalCalls >= 100,                    "High-Rate API Enumeration",
        UniqueResources >= 10,                "Cross-Resource Enumeration",
        "Anomalous API Activity"
    ),
    RiskScore = DeleteOps * 10 + SecretOps * 15 + PermOps * 8 + (TotalCalls / 10)
| project
    TimeGenerated = FirstSeen,
    CallerUPN,
    ThreatType,
    RiskScore,
    TotalCalls,
    DeleteOps,
    SecretOps,
    PermOps,
    UniqueResources,
    UniqueOperations,
    Operations
| sort by RiskScore desc

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Risk Score: {{RiskScore}} | {{TotalCalls}} API calls | {{DeleteOps}} deletes | {{SecretOps}} secret ops
